creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #4)
Thank you for the suggestion!
I'll add a KASAN kernel to my toolkit.

However, I recently upgraded from circa 14.1 stable/14 to the 14.2-ish branch.
I also upgraded the nvidia driver 550.120 -> 550.127.05 at the same time.
Since then I haven't seen the crash.

Previously it would happen on every other reboot, but now I have done 10+ of them and not a single crash.

I'll keep this PR open for another couple of weeks, just in case.
